pdf_summary.note: After correctly counting prior batches' lab_items + svc_items fields, only 105 codes are new. The other 94 'apparent new' codes (X12, X13, X14, X15) were processed in batch-18 of the SPECIJALISTICKE import.

price_observation.interpretation: BOLNICKO PDF lists ~58% lower prices than SPECIJALISTICKE PDF for identical codes (e.g. A01001: 25.02 vs 9.75 EUR). Per same-bod system, BOLNICKO uses inpatient discount tariffs while SPECIJALISTICKE is outpatient.
price_observation.decision: Keep existing SPECIJALISTICKE prices. INSERT IGNORE silently skips 2576 duplicates. Only 105 truly-new BOLNICKO codes are inserted with their bolnicko prices.

batches.notes: Single-batch consolidation. G06=blood units (10), Y01=hospital workup (16), Y02=nursing intensity (8), Y03=delivery room (1), Y04=food costs (5), Y05=operating-theatre tier I/II (10), Y06=bed-day stays (6), Y07=op dressings (5), Y08=injection materials (1), Y09=ambulatory dressings (3), Y10=plaster casts (38), Y11=on-call exam (1), Y12=cardiac rehab (1).

category_assignments.G06, Y01, Y02, Y04, Y05, Y06, Y11: no clean category match — left without category/specialty (administrative/billing line items or general nursing care)

name_collision_handling.Y07 vs Y09 dressings: Y07 has prefix 'Operation' (Operation Small Dressing I/II...), Y09 has prefix 'Ambulatory' (Ambulatory Small Dressing...) to avoid name_en collisions.
name_collision_handling.Y05 tier I vs II: Y05001-Y05005 (Tier I) and Y05006-Y05010 (Tier II) — same Serbian name with whitespace diff, distinguished in EN by Tier I/II based on price differential.
